name: Krisp
description: Krisp — AI noise cancellation SDK that removes background noise and echo from audio in real-time calls.

seo.title: Krisp — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Krisp: Krisp — AI noise cancellation SDK that removes background noise and echo from audio in real-time calls.

when_to_use: AI noise cancellation SDK for video conferencing app
Echo suppression for call center agent audio quality
Background noise removal for remote work tools
Real-time audio enhancement for podcast recording apps
Voice SDK for clean audio in customer support platforms

pros: SDK embeds into voice and meeting products easily
Works across platforms with low latency
Saves engineering effort vs training own models
cons: Narrow scope — noise/echo only, not a full CPaaS
SDK licensing pricing can be steep at scale
Adds package size to native mobile apps
Limited tuning exposed for niche acoustic cases
review.verdict: If you ship voice or meeting software, Krisp is often cheaper than reinventing noise suppression yourself.
review.best_for: Voice/meeting apps and call centers embedding noise cancellation into their stack
review.not_for: Teams looking for a full messaging or telephony platform

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
